_storageComment: AzureStorage:ConnectionString is required for the note tools (notes are blobs). Set it in App Service config as AzureStorage__ConnectionString.
_todosComment: Todos:SqlConnectionString points at the SQL DB holding the 'books' schema (same value the web app uses). Set it as Todos__SqlConnectionString. Leave blank to disable the todo tools here.
_comment: Set Oauth:Authority (issuer, e.g. https://<tenant>.us.auth0.com/) and Oauth:Audience (API identifier) to require OAuth. Leave blank to run no-auth locally.
